name: aidome-endpoint-switchboard
description: Configure AI coding assistants to route through enterprise-approved LLM endpoints. Supports Continue, Cline, Roo Code, Kilo Code, Codex CLI, and more.

aidome-switchboard.advanced.cliDetection.markdownDescription: Timeout in milliseconds for each CLI detection subprocess. Environment override: `AIDOME_SWITCHBOARD_CLI_DETECTION_TIMEOUT_MS`.

aidome-switchboard.advanced.httpTimeoutM.markdownDescription: Default HTTP request timeout in milliseconds for extension-managed requests. Environment override: `HTTP_TIMEOUT_MS`.

aidome-switchboard.advanced.httpRetryBac.markdownDescription: Maximum exponential-backoff delay in milliseconds between HTTP retries. Environment override: `AIDOME_SWITCHBOARD_HTTP_RETRY_BACKOFF_MAX_MS`.

aidome-switchboard.advanced.aidomeClient.markdownDescription: Time-to-live in milliseconds for cached AIdome capabilities responses. Environment override: `AIDOME_SWITCHBOARD_AIDOME_CLIENT_CACHE_TTL_MS`.

aidome-switchboard.advanced.logBufferSiz.markdownDescription: Maximum number of log entries retained in the in-memory diagnostics buffer. Environment override: `AIDOME_SWITCHBOARD_LOG_BUFFER_SIZE`.

aidome-switchboard.advanced.tlsVerify.markdownDescription: When enabled (default), all HTTPS requests made by the extension verify TLS certificates. Disable **only** for trusted internal endpoints with self-signed certificates. Environment override: `AIDOME_SWITCHBOARD_TLS_VERIFY`.

aidome-switchboard.advanced.verifier.tls.markdownDescription: Timeout in milliseconds for TLS certificate validation. Environment override: `AIDOME_SWITCHBOARD_VERIFIER_TLS_TIMEOUT_MS`.

aidome-switchboard.advanced.verifier.end.markdownDescription: Timeout in milliseconds for the verifier reachability probe. Environment override: `AIDOME_SWITCHBOARD_VERIFIER_ENDPOINT_REACHABILITY_TIMEOUT_MS`.

aidome-switchboard.advanced.verifier.hea.markdownDescription: Timeout in milliseconds for optional health endpoint checks. Environment override: `AIDOME_SWITCHBOARD_VERIFIER_HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT_MS`.

aidome-switchboard.advanced.verifier.mod.markdownDescription: Timeout in milliseconds for model-list validation. Environment override: `AIDOME_SWITCHBOARD_VERIFIER_MODEL_LIST_TIMEOUT_MS`.

aidome-switchboard.advanced.verifier.dia.markdownDescription: Timeout in milliseconds for lightweight dialect validation probes. Environment override: `AIDOME_SWITCHBOARD_VERIFIER_DIALECT_VALIDATION_TIMEOUT_MS`.

aidome-switchboard.advanced.verifier.tes.markdownDescription: Timeout in milliseconds for the optional test-prompt verification step. Environment override: `AIDOME_SWITCHBOARD_VERIFIER_TEST_PROMPT_TIMEOUT_MS`.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with LLM Endpoint Switchboard
walkthroughs.description: Configure your AI coding assistants to use enterprise-approved endpoints

steps.title: Welcome to LLM Endpoint Switchboard
steps.description:
This extension helps you configure AI coding assistants (Cline, Continue, Roo Code, etc.) to route through your approved LLM gateway endpoint.

**No data leaves your machine** — this is a configuration tool only.

[Learn More](https://github.com/AIdome-co/aidome-endpoint-switchboard-vscode#readme)

steps.title: Run the Setup Wizard
steps.description:
The wizard detects your installed AI assistants, creates an endpoint profile, and automatically configures supported assistants.

[Run Setup Wizard](command:aidome-switchboard.setupSwitchboard)

steps.title: Verify Your Configuration
steps.description:
Run the 7-step verification pipeline to ensure your endpoint is reachable and correctly configured.

[Verify Routing](command:aidome-switchboard.verifyRouting)

steps.title: Explore Available Models
steps.description:
View the models and providers available through your gateway endpoint.

[Show Models & Providers](command:aidome-switchboard.showModelsProviders)

scripts.copy-resources: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const dir = 'out/core/registry'; fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('src/core/registry/assistants.registry.json', dir + '/assistants.registry.json');"
scripts.pretest:e2e: npm run compile && npm run compile:e2e
